title: psoralea tenuiflora var. bigelovii
intro: Psoralea tenuiflora var. bigelovii is a plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the goat's thorn or desert pea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antioxidant. The health benefits of Psoralea tenuiflora var. bigelovii include its potential to improve bone health, reduce the risk of osteoporosis, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are used to support overall health and well-being.
